commands.command: npm run backend:build && node --test backend-dist/database.test.js backend-dist/server.test.js
commands.summary: Database and HTTP coverage for CLV-011 passed. Schema v9 adds contact_policy.quiet_hours_override. Contact policy decisions suppress unread attention for muted/blocked inbound contacts, reject contact-resolved agent messages when agent messages, approval requests, or urgent interrupts are disallowed, and allow explicitly trusted/operator policies. 28/28 selected backend/migration tests pass.

Renderer coverage passed. Contact edit modal loads contact policy, saves trust level plus allow-agent/approval/urgent/quiet-hours-override/block/muted policy fields through POST /api/contacts/policy, and preserves existing contact metadata/contact-point flows. 22/22 renderer tests pass.

Full suite green: 72 deterministic tests pass, 1 live Twilio test skipped by design. Backend build, renderer build, renderer interaction tests, backend node tests, and main/preload/runtime syntax checks all passed.

commands.command: python scripts/repopact_cli.py dashboard && python scripts/repopact_cli.py doctor && python scripts/validate_repo.py
commands.summary: RepoPact records are current: dashboard regenerated, doctor reports healthy, and repository governance validation passed.
Local system audit passed: required files, 18 work items, lifecycle counts, stale README checks, work item manifests, and Markdown link/date checks are current.

commands.command: npm run scan:secrets && npm run scan:deps
commands.summary: Secret scan clean and production dependency audit reports 0 vulnerabilities.

environment.process_note: 015 Phase 3 CLV-011 (contact-level policy). Contact policy is now enforceable, not just persisted, and schema v9 adds quiet_hours_override for contact-specific attention policy representation. SMS/MMS inbound from blocked or muted contact points is durably stored but does not raise unread attention. Agent-channel messages whose source resolves through contact_points are rejected when the contact is blocked/muted, disallows agent messages, disallows approval requests for approval kinds, or disallows urgent interrupts for urgent messages. Unknown agent sources keep current local-channel behavior, while unknown contact policy defaults still deny approval and urgent privileges. Future voice behavior will reuse the same policy helpers when call rows and voice events are added.
